Alternatively, we can note that `f (x * y) = F (x * y)` (by definition of `f`) and also that `F (x * y) = F x * F y` because `F` preserves composition. But to formalize this, we need to use the fact that in `Category.Monoid α`, `x * y` is `x ≫ y`, and then `F (x ≫ y) = F x ≫ F y = F x * F y`.

But perhaps it's better to directly use `map_comp`.

We want to show that `f (x * y) = f x * f y`, i.e., that `F (x * y) = F x * F y`. 

But in `Category.Monoid α`, `(x : Hom () ()) ≫ (y : Hom () ()) = (x * y : Hom () ())`. 

Thus, by `map_comp`, `F (x ≫ y) = F x ≫ F y`, i.e., `F (x * y) = F x ≫ F y`.

But in `Category.Monoid β`, `F x ≫ F y = F x * F y`, because the composition is multiplication.

    intro x
    rfl
  -- Define the group homomorphism f using the action of F on morphisms
  have h₂ : ∃ (f : α →* β), ∀ (x : α), F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x = f x := by
    classical

      have h₄ := F.map_id ()
      simp [Category.id] at h₄ ⊢
      <;> simp_all [Category.Monoid.one_mul]
      <;> rfl
    -- Define the group homomorphism f
    refine' ⟨{ toFun := fun x => F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x
      map_one' := by simpa using h₃
      map_mul' := _ }, _⟩
    · -- Prove that f is multiplicative
      intro a b
      have h₅ := F.map_comp (a : MonoidHom α α) (b : MonoidHom α α)
      simp [MonoidHom.toFun_eq] at h₅ ⊢
      <;> simp_all [Function.comp_apply, mul_assoc]
      <;> try simp_all [MonoidHom.map_mul]
      <;> try simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
      <;> try simp_all [MonoidHom.map_mul]
      <;> try simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
      <;> try simp_all [MonoidHom.map_mul]
    · -- Prove that f(x) = F(x)
      intro x
      rfl
  -- Obtain the group homomorphism f

  -- Use f to satisfy the conclusion
  refine' ⟨f, _⟩
  intro x
  apply hf

    (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try {
      have h₄ := F.map_comp (X := ()) (Y := ()) (Z := ()) (Hom.mk (x : Unit →* Unit) (by simp)) (Hom.mk (y : Unit →* Unit) (by simp))
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  have h₃ : F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) 1 = 1 := by
    have h₄ : F.map_id (X := ()) = by simp
    simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]) <;>
    (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try {
      have h₅ := F.map_id (X := ())
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  have h₄ : ∀ (x : α), F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) (x⁻¹) = (F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x)⁻¹ := by
    intro x
    have h₅ : F.map_comp (X := ()) (Y := ()) (Z := ()) (Hom.mk (x⁻¹ : Unit →* Unit) (by simp)) (Hom.mk (x : Unit →* Unit) (by simp)) = by simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
    have h₆ : F.map_comp (X := ()) (Y := ()) (Z := ()) (Hom.mk (x : Unit →* Unit) (by simp)) (Hom.mk (x⁻¹ : Unit →* Unit) (by simp)) = by simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
    simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]) <;>
    (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try {
      have h₇ := F.map_comp (X := ()) (Y := ()) (Z := ()) (Hom.mk (x⁻¹ : Unit →* Unit) (by simp)) (Hom.mk (x : Unit →* Unit) (by simp))
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      have h₈ := F.map_comp (X := ()) (Y := ()) (Z := ()) (Hom.mk (x : Unit →* Unit) (by simp)) (Hom.mk (x⁻¹ : Unit →* Unit) (by simp))
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  have h₅ : ∃ (f : α →* β), ∀ (x : α), F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x = f x := by
    refine' ⟨{ toFun := f, map_one' := _, map_mul' := _ }, _⟩
    · -- Prove that f(1) = 1
      have h₆ := h₃
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    · -- Prove that f(x * y) = f(x) * f(y)
      intro x y
      have h₆ := h₂ x y
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    · -- Prove that f(x) = F.homF(x)
      intro x
      have h₆ := hf x
      simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff, mul_one, one_mul]) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_assoc]) <;>
      (try aesop)
  exact h₅

refine' ⟨⟨fun x => F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x, _, _⟩, _⟩
  · -- Prove that the function preserves the identity element
    simp [F.map_id]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Category.id, Monoid.one_mul, Monoid.mul_one])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
  · -- Prove that the function preserves the multiplication
    intro x y
    have h := F.map_comp (x := ()) (y := ()) (z := ()) (f := x) (g := y)
    simp at h ⊢
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Category.comp, Monoid.mul_assoc])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
  · -- Prove that the function applied to any x is equal to itself
    intro x
    rfl

group_cat_functor {α β : Type*} [Group α] [Group β]
    (F : @Functor Unit Unit (Category.Monoid α) (Category.Monoid β)) :
    ∃ f: α →* β, ∀ x: α, F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x = f x := by sorry
